rationale: The image contains a table detailing the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 15th IAC Sessions, including their dates and locations. This is factual content relevant to history and culture.
cleanedText:
IAC Session | Date | Site
1st | 1993 Sept 12-14 | Pułtusk, Poland
2nd | 1995 May 3-5 | Paris, France
3rd | 1997 Sept 29 – Oct 1 | Tashkent, Uzbekistan
15th | 2025 Feb 26–28 | Paris, France
